<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Session\Storage; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request; /** * @author Jérémy Derussé <jeremy@derusse.com> */ interface SessionStorageFactoryInterface { /** * Creates a new instance of SessionStorageInterface. */ public function createStorage(?Request $request): SessionStorageInterface; }
